jobs.title: Predictive Toxicologist
jobs.location: Research Triangle Park, North Carolina, United States
jobs.description: Scientific writing/editing experience, strong technical writing and organizational skills, ability to evaluate statistical data, familiarity with MS Word/Excel/PowerPoint, and willingness to learn R or Python; B.S. required, M.S. preferred; 1+ to 4+ years scientific writing/editing experience.

jobs.title: Environmental Toxicologist (Biochemist) (76341)
jobs.description: Ph.D. with 5+ years (or MS with 8+ years, or BS with 10+ years) in toxicology or related life science; expertise in in vivo toxicology, GLP and regulatory guidelines (OECD, ICH); study leadership, project management, and strong communication; legal U.S. work authorization required.

jobs.title: Toxicologist 9-P11/12 - Hazardous Waste Program
jobs.description: Master's in toxicology or related science with specified coursework; professional experience assessing toxic substances and conducting risk assessments; must provide transcripts and application materials.

jobs.title: Environmental Scientist
jobs.description: Bachelor's in environmental engineering, geology, or environmental science; 3–6 years experience with project management and emergency response; experience in air monitoring, environmental sampling, ICS, SCAT, GIS, and client management.

jobs.title: Environmental Scientist
jobs.description: BS in environmental or physical sciences,2+ years environmental industry experience,practical field sampling experience,multimedia sampling,ability to travel and work outdoors,valid driver's license required.

jobs.title: Environmental Scientist
jobs.description: 5+ years supporting environmental remediation, site characterization, waste management or restoration; technical writing; environmental and radiological analyses; DOE clearance eligibility; US citizenship and pre-employment screening required.

jobs.title: Environmental Scientist
jobs.description: Bachelors in environmental or related field, 4+ years environmental consulting/regulatory experience, wetland/stream delineation experience, permit preparation knowledge, WPIT or PWS or ability to obtain, strong communication skills.

jobs.title: Environmental Scientist
jobs.description: Bachelor's in environmental science or related field, relevant environmental field experience, valid driver's license and watercraft/trailering experience, ability to lift 30–50 lbs, and strong written and verbal communication skills.

jobs.title: Environmental Scientist
jobs.description: Bachelor's in geology/environmental science/hydrogeology/engineering (or equivalent), 0-2 years environmental field experience, OSHA 40-hour HAZWOPER (preferred), TWIC card (preferred), Microsoft Office proficiency, and field sampling/monitoring skills.

jobs.title: Environmental Scientist
jobs.description: Bachelor's in a related science, 5+ years supporting environmental remediation or waste management, strong technical writing and analytical skills, U.S. citizenship, ability to obtain DOE security clearance.

jobs.title: Environmental Scientist
jobs.description: Bachelor's in environmental science/geology/engineering, 1–3 years relevant experience, Phase I and Phase II ESAs required, strong written/verbal communication, organized self-starter.

jobs.title: Environmental Scientist
jobs.description: 5+ years environmental experience, bachelor’s or master’s in related field, wetland/species permitting knowledge, ArcGIS familiarity, technical writing, ecological field work, client coordination, and travel flexibility.

jobs.title: Environmental Scientist
jobs.description: Bachelor's in civil/environmental engineering or related, 2 years related experience, skills in geohazard simulation, H&H and groundwater modeling, statistical and ML analysis, numerical modeling, and report preparation.

jobs.title: Environmental Scientist
jobs.description: Bachelor's in a related scientific field, 2+ years environmental field sampling and data collection, HAZWOPER preferred, valid driver's license and reliable transportation, Microsoft 365 proficiency, technical writing skills.

jobs.title: Environmental Scientist
jobs.description: Bachelor's or master's in environmental science or related field (or equivalent experience), minimum 1 year experience with wetland/stream delineations, field and reporting skills, permitting knowledge, ability to travel for field work.

jobs.title: Environmental Scientist
jobs.description: Bachelor's degree in a natural science, 2 years environmental science experience, valid Florida driver license, FWC Gopher Tortoise Agent Permit desirable, ability to lift 50 lbs, frequent overnight travel and field work required.

jobs.title: Environmental Scientist
jobs.description: Bachelor's degree in a related science/engineering field, 5+ years environmental field and compliance experience, strong technical writing, field sampling, project planning, safety plan development, Microsoft Office skills, valid driver's license, 40-hour HAZWOPER.

jobs.title: Environmental Scientist
jobs.description: Bachelor's or Master's in environmental science/ecology/biology/geology, 1+ years relevant experience (Phase I/II ESAs, wetlands, ecological surveys), MS Office proficiency, ArcGIS knowledge preferred, strong writing/communication, willingness to travel and perform fieldwork.

jobs.title: Environmental Scientist
jobs.description: Four years experience in environmental/physical/biological/math/engineering or equivalent combination; valid Class C driver's license; ability to lift 35 lbs; capable of long outdoor field work; Kansas Tax Clearance Certificate required post-offer.

jobs.title: Associate Environmental Scientist
jobs.description: Bachelor's in environmental science or related field, 1+ years post-education environmental field experience, GIS and Trimble GPS experience, knowledge of environmental laws, field sampling and data analysis skills, strong communication and safety compliance.

jobs.title: NEPA Environmental Scientist
jobs.location: Lackland Air Force Base, Texas, United States
jobs.description: U.S. citizenship and ability to obtain/maintain NACI/CAC; bachelor’s in Environmental Sciences; minimum 3 years NEPA/environmental planning experience; strong knowledge of federal environmental regulations and NEPA; MS Office proficiency; strong written and verbal communication.

jobs.title: Environmental Scientist II
jobs.location: Birmingham or Mobile or Pelham or Montgomery
jobs.description: Bachelor's in Engineering or Environmental Science, 2+ years professional experience, knowledge of environmental permitting/regulations (AL or MO), EIT/GRIT/CEP/CHMM preferred.

jobs.title: Chief Environmental Scientist
jobs.description: Bachelor's in environmental or related science with 7 years' experience OR Master's with 5 years; strong knowledge of environmental regulations, permitting, air/water quality, and project leadership.

jobs.title: Environmental Scientist 2
jobs.description: Bachelor's in Environmental Science, 5+ years technical/field experience preparing environmental documents, strong writing, communication, MS Office proficiency, and ability to work independently and on teams.

jobs.title: Environmental Scientist 2
jobs.description: Bachelor's in environmental science/engineering, 3+ years environmental compliance experience, knowledge of federal/state regulations, analytical skills, strong communication, and proficiency with Microsoft Office and Adobe Acrobat.

jobs.title: ENVIRONMENTAL SCIENTIST I
jobs.description: Bachelor's degree in environmental/physical/biological science or related field required; conduct fieldwork, inspections, data collection/analysis, and prepare technical reports; knowledge of environmental laws and regulations.

jobs.title: Senior Environmental Scientist
jobs.description: Requires a bachelor’s (master’s preferred) in environmental science/ecology/environmental planning or related, 2+ years relevant experience, familiarity with GIS, Microsoft Office proficiency, fieldwork capability, and strong communication skills.

jobs.title: Chief Environmental Scientist
jobs.description: Bachelor's in a related field with 7+ years (or Master's with 5+ years); expertise in environmental regulations, permits, project management, and team leadership for large mining operations.

jobs.title: Environmental Scientist III/IV
jobs.description: Bachelors in environmental science/related field, 6+ years environmental consulting experience, NPDES/ stormwater/SPCC knowledge, environmental sampling and data analysis, strong communication and project skills.

jobs.company: Energy & Environment Cabinet | Department for Natural Resources

jobs.title: Environmental Scientist
jobs.description: 4+ years' relevant experience, bachelor's degree in environmental or related field, ecological field work, wetland/species permitting knowledge, technical writing skills, ArcGIS familiarity, and willingness to travel 15-20%.

jobs.description: Bachelor's in physical/natural/environmental science, soil science, engineering, or chemistry plus 4 years related experience (or equivalent combination); valid driver and defensive driving certification; conducts inspections and enforces environmental health regulations.

jobs.title: Environmental Scientist II - Williamsport
jobs.description: 5+ years environmental experience, B.S. in environmental science or related, independent wetland/stream delineation, PADEP/USACE permit preparation, sub-meter GPS proficiency, Microsoft Office, valid driver’s license.

jobs.title: Mid-level Environmental Scientist
jobs.description: Bachelor's degree in environmental science/engineering/chemistry, 4+ years environmental compliance experience, US citizenship required, valid driver's license, regulatory knowledge (Clean Air, Clean Water, RCRA, TSCA, EPCRA), and proficiency with compliance tracking tools and spreadsheets.

jobs.title: Environmental Scientist
jobs.description: Bachelor's degree required; OSHA certifications for fieldwork (HAZWOPER, OSHA 10/30/40) and valid driver's license required; must pass federal background check; ~25% travel; experience with field sampling and technical writing preferred; training provided.
